owner.name: Matthew Robin
owner.summary: Full-stack web developer building practical products across frontend, backend, APIs, and data systems. Experienced shipping React, Django, and Node.js applications with authentication, real-time features, and cloud deployment.

projects.name: MHH Client Services Management System
projects.stabilityNote: Live system is available. If environment services are down, use the source code and architecture notes below.
projects.problem: Service organizations need reliable intake, case tracking, and follow-up workflows for staff and clients.
build: Built a production-ready client intake and case management platform with separate frontend, API, and admin layers.
Implemented case notes, CSV export, automated follow-up reminders, and secure document/resume uploads.
Integrated Azure deployment pipeline with managed PostgreSQL and blob storage.
impact: Reduced manual intake and case tracking overhead through centralized workflows.
Improved staff visibility into follow-ups with timestamped notes and reminders.
Delivered a maintainable cloud deployment pattern suitable for ongoing org use.

projects.name: CheckIn Social App
projects.stabilityNote: Demo may be limited by third-party auth or API quotas at times. Source remains fully available.
projects.problem: Users need a lightweight way to discover places, check in with friends, and track social activity around venues.
build: Built a React + TypeScript social check-in experience with authentication and profile management.
Integrated Supabase for auth, relational data, and real-time social interactions.
Shipped installable PWA behavior and responsive UI for mobile-first usage.
impact: Created a full social flow from discovery to posting, profile activity, and community interactions.
Demonstrated production deployment and auth-backed UX in a modern frontend stack.
Provided a foundation for location-based product iteration.

projects.name: MTG Pile
projects.stabilityNote: Live environment may not always be up; review source and architecture for complete implementation details.
projects.problem: Competitive MTG players need faster ways to search cards, compare alternatives, and evaluate deck decisions.
build: Built a full-stack card platform with React frontend and Express API backend.
Implemented JWT authentication, card organization workflows, and rate-limited API integrations.
Connected external card data sources and monetization-ready affiliate link flow.
impact: Centralized search, analysis, and card decision workflows in one product.
Demonstrated third-party API integration and secure user auth patterns.
Showcased business-aware engineering through affiliate and growth-oriented architecture.

projects.name: Walking Buddy App
projects.stabilityNote: Primary portfolio value is in backend architecture and real-time features. Source is the best review path.
projects.problem: People looking for local walking partners need trust, communication, and logistics in one platform.
build: Designed a Django REST backend with social graph, profile data, and moderated ratings.
Implemented WebSocket-powered real-time chat and coordination features.
Added JWT auth, Docker-based development workflows, and asynchronous task support.
impact: Enabled social discovery, messaging, and activity coordination in a single system.
Demonstrated full-stack readiness for real-time and safety-moderated community apps.
Established scalable backend patterns for future mobile clients.

projects.name: OnusOne P2P
projects.stabilityNote: Public demo is currently unavailable. Source and architecture are available for full review.
projects.problem: Decentralized communication tools need trustless identity, durable messaging, and transparent incentives.
build: Built a web3 messaging platform with wallet authentication and custom token mechanics.
Implemented multi-service architecture across frontend, node networking, and compliance backend layers.
Integrated distributed storage and real-time communication channels.
impact: Demonstrated ability to deliver complex multi-stack systems with novel product logic.
Showcased architecture design beyond a standard CRUD application.
Proved practical integration of web2 and web3 development models.

experience.title: IT Support & Web Developer (Contract)
highlights: Diagnosed network issues including subnet conflicts and passthrough configuration.
Provided endpoint deployment and technical support across staff and partner organizations.
Building internal client portal and database systems.

experience.title: Contract Software Engineer
highlights: Built and maintained Angular/TypeScript UI components for internal resource management tools.
Wrote SQL queries for reporting and operational tracking.

experience.title: Software Developer
highlights: Built Angular/TypeScript frontend components for internal resource workflows.
Developed Python automation scripts to reduce manual deployment steps.
